hand.title: Daily Hand

events.text: You raised before the cards were dealt. Your opponent called.
Flop — Queen, 4, 10. You bet. Your opponent raised you back.

wrongReasons: 9 J has similar strength, but look at when the aggression shifted — the turn card connects with the correct hand in a way it doesn't connect with 9 J.
4 A makes a four of a kind here — a hand that strong would have raised earlier and pushed harder for maximum value. The measured sizing in this hand points to something weaker.
6 2 has similar strength, but look at when the aggression shifted — the turn card connects with the correct hand in a way it doesn't connect with 6 2.
hand.explanation:
Answer: 9 8

Your opponent flopped three of a kind and raised the flop immediately to build the pot. Sets are too strong to slow-play — they pushed their advantage on every street.
